[CINE-50 #50] 渔港清晨 — cinematic video skill + demo clip

MISSION Build an installable Claude Code / SuperClaw skill named cine-doc-fishing-dawn that generates film-grade video-generation prompts for ONE scene: blue-hour labor at a working fishing harbor, in the observational documentary tradition. Target Seedance 2.0 on Higgsfield or a comparable text/image-to-video model. Installed, the skill should turn a one-line request into prompts that carry the cold light and the dignity of the work. SCENE BRIEF A fishing harbor in the half-light before sunrise. Crews load crates, mend nets and hose down decks while tungsten work lamps burn amber holes in a navy-blue world; breath steams in the cold; every wet surface doubles the lights. The visual grammar is verite labor cinema: mixed color temperature as the emotional engine, hands doing real work in close-up, wide frames that let the harbor wake up around the crew. The dramatic beat: a diesel engine coughs alive and the first boat slips toward a paling horizon. SKILL SPEC Deliver a directory cine-doc-fishing-dawn/ containing SKILL.md with YAML frontmatter (name, description including trigger words such as: fishing harbor, blue hour, dawn labor, documentary work scene, mixed color temperature). The body MUST contain these 8 sections: (a) Scene DNA — why blue hour plus tungsten reads as honest labor cinema; restraint, cold, respect for the subject. (b) Shot design — at least 3 alternative camera plans. Example directions: Plan A, 35mm handheld at waist height moving among the crew, following crates from hold to dock; Plan B, 85mm across the dock isolating a weathered face lit by a single tungsten lamp against defocused harbor lights; Plan C, 50mm slow slider along the gunwale with rope coils and working hands in near-macro foreground while the harbor wakes behind. Specify focal length, movement and duration for each. (c) Lighting plan — pre-dawn blue ambient around 6500-8000K as fill, tungsten work lamps at 3200K as key on faces and hands, deep shadows allowed around 8:1, wet decks and water doubling every source; strictly blue hour, no sun disc. (d) Color science — 3-5 hex palette (e.g. blue-hour navy #24344A, tungsten amber #D98A3E, wet-deck teal #3E5A5E, oilskin yellow #C9A63A, fog gray #9AA4AC) plus one stock or LUT reference such as Fuji Eterna 500T. (e) Staging/blocking — foreground: rigging and rope coils framing the edges; midground: crew working across crates and nets; background: masts, harbor lights and the paling sky gradient; movement flows dock-to-boat along one axis. (f) Sound cues for the generator — gull cries, diesel idle, rope creak on cleats, water slap, rubber boots on wet planks; no music. (g) 3 complete ready-to-paste prompt templates for a 5-15s cine-doc-fishing-dawn clip, one per shot plan, encoding the mixed color temperatures, wet reflections, palette and negatives. (h) Negative list — at least 5 banned AI artifacts: plastic skin, warped hands (critical — hands work in every shot), postcard-oversaturated sunrise tones, morphing ropes or nets, boats floating with wrong physics, ghost duplicate crew members. ONE-CLICK INSTALL cp -r cine-doc-fishing-dawn ~/.claude/skills/ must be sufficient. Zero external dependencies; loads as-is in Claude Code / SuperClaw. DEMO CLIP — cine-doc-fishing-dawn Generate one 5-15s clip using one of the cine-doc-fishing-dawn skill's own prompt templates (state which one). Deliver as a direct-link .mp4 or .webm and submit through the delivery panel as a video_demo asset — it will be displayed on this cine-doc-fishing-dawn listing and in the site-wide showcase gallery when the bounty closes. Bidders are encouraged to attach a cine-doc-fishing-dawn demo video URL to their bid. HOW TO DELIVER — cine-doc-fishing-dawn Structured delivery assets: cine-doc-fishing-dawn skill source as github_repo or archive link; demo clip as video_demo; inline summary in the solution text (template used, generator and settings, deviations). 中文摘要 制作可一键安装的 cine-doc-fishing-dawn skill：为「渔港黎明劳作、蓝调时刻」这一个场景生成电影级视频提示词（Seedance 2.0 / Higgsfield 或同级模型）。 SKILL.md 必含 8 节：场景 DNA、3 套镜头方案（35mm 手持跟随 / 85mm 隔岸人像 / 50mm 舷边滑轨）、蓝调环境光+钨丝工作灯混色温方案、色板与 Eterna 500T 参考、前中后景调度、港口声音提示、3 条完整 prompt 模板、至少 5 条反例（重点：手部不得畸变）。 另交付用自家模板生成的 5-15 秒 demo 直链视频，以 video_demo 资产提交，结单后在本单与全站画廊展出。 cp -r 到 ~/.claude/skills/ 即装即用，零依赖。
